name: pionex-mcp
description: Pionex MCP Server — market data, account management, spot orders, and trading bots.
long_description: Gives Claude direct access to Pionex exchange: real-time market data (depth, tickers, klines), account balances, spot order management, and automated trading bots (Futures Grid, Spot Grid, Smart Copy). API credentials are stored securely and never written to config files.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Pionex API key (create one at pionex.com → API Management).

tools.name: pionex_market_get_depth
tools.description: Get order book depth for a trading pair

tools.name: pionex_market_get_trades
tools.description: Get recent trades for a trading pair

tools.name: pionex_market_get_tickers
tools.description: Get price tickers for all or specific symbols

tools.name: pionex_account_get_balance_full
tools.description: Get full account balance overview including futures

tools.name: pionex_orders_get_order
tools.description: Get order details by order ID

tools.name: pionex_bot_smart_copy_create
tools.description: Start a Smart Copy trading bot

tools.name: pionex_bot_smart_copy_cancel
tools.description: Stop a Smart Copy trading bot

tools.name: system_get_capabilities
tools.description: Get server capabilities and module availability
